gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, while dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, and career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, and students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, and alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station; additionally, healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, while tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps; moreover, a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, and students clutch resumes inside branded folders.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, while dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, and career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, and students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, and alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, and healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, while tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, and students clutch resumes inside branded folders.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance; additionally, alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, and dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, while career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact; furthermore, students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos; moreover, a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, and students clutch resumes inside branded folders.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, and dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor; consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, while career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps; additionally, alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, and healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos; furthermore, students are lining up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, and students clutch resumes inside branded folders; finally, a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system.

Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, and dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor; consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, while career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps; additionally, alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, and healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos; furthermore, students are lining up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, and students clutch resumes inside branded folders; finally, a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Students are lining up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, and event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, while consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps; dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, and alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, while career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, and additionally, healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, and students clutch resumes inside branded folders; a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system.
